mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_projects ( agency_id, project_code, name, event_type, description, cover_image_url, start_date, end_date, work_start_time, work_end_time, address, address_detail, gps_radius, break_minutes, welfare, recruitment_deadline, preferred_qualifications, start_recruitment_immediately, status, crew_current, crew_total, budget, progress, created_by_member_id ) VALUES ( #{agencyId}, #{projectCode}, #{name}, #{eventType}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{workStartTime}, #{workEndTime}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{gpsRadius}, #{breakMinutes}, #{welfare}, #{recruitmentDeadline}, #{preferredQualifications}, #{startRecruitmentImmediately}, #{status}, #{crewCurrent}, #{crewTotal}, #{budget}, #{progress}, #{createdByMemberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(project_code FROM 5) AS INT)), 0 ) + 1 FROM admin_projects

SELECT id, agency_id, project_code, name, event_type, description, cover_image_url, start_date, end_date, work_start_time, work_end_time, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, gps_radius, break_minutes, welfare, recruitment_deadline, preferred_qualifications, start_recruitment_immediately, status, crew_current, crew_total, budget, progress, created_by_member_id, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_projects WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, agency_id, project_code, name, event_type, description, cover_image_url, start_date, end_date, work_start_time, work_end_time, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, gps_radius, break_minutes, welfare, recruitment_deadline, preferred_qualifications, start_recruitment_immediately, status, crew_current, crew_total, budget, progress, created_by_member_id, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_projects WHERE project_code = #{projectCode}

SELECT id, agency_id, project_code, name, event_type, description, cover_image_url, start_date, end_date, work_start_time, work_end_time, address, address_detail, latitude, longitude, gps_radius, break_minutes, welfare, recruitment_deadline, preferred_qualifications, start_recruitment_immediately, status, crew_current, crew_total, budget, progress, created_by_member_id, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_projects WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_projects WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_projects SET latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, address = COALESCE(#{address}, address), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_code = #{projectCode}
